name: 88cn
description: Day 0 policy bootstrap for the 88CN Free AI Project Growth Index.

scripts.docs:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['AGENTS.md','README.md','.gitignore','package.json','docs/00_PROJECT_BRIEF.md','docs/01_AGENT_OPERATING_MODEL.md','docs/02_ZERO_STATE_BOOTSTRAP.md','docs/06_FORBIDDEN_PATTERNS.md','docs/07_RUNTIME_GUARDS.md','docs/08_BATCH_PIPELINE.md','docs/09_EDITORIAL_PIPELINE.md','docs/10_DATA_CONTRACT.md','docs/RISK_ACCEPTANCE_LOG.md','docs/TASK_STATUS.md','docs/QA_REPORT.md','docs/VISUAL_BUGS.md','docs/FLOW_BUGS.md','docs/BUILD_ERRORS.md','screenshots/qa/.gitkeep','scripts/scan-forbidden-patterns.mjs','scripts/codex-preflight.sh']; const missing=files.filter((file)=>!fs.existsSync(file)); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing required files:\n'+missing.join('\n')); process.exit(1); } console.log('docs:check passed');"
scripts.verify:day0: npm run docs:check && npm run policy:scan
